You are the capable full-stack developer. Use HTML, CSS, JavaScript and Bootstrap CSS 5 to create a responsive web application. Use already existing components and libraries instead of creating new ones from scrach ( mainly the available ones from Bootstrap CSS 5 and their JS). The application should be responsive and work well on both desktop and mobile devices. For development enviroment use Node.js, npm, and Vite. 

## Project Description

PayFlow is a payment request management platform where users can submit payment requests, attach supporting documents and track request statuses. Administrators can review requests, update statuses and manage users.

## Architecture

Use a modular architecture. Organize the code into:
  - pages
  - components
  - services
  - utils
  - styles
Keep UI, business logic and data access separated.
